programme.title: Ghost Adventures
programme.desc: The crew goes to Denton, Texas, to investigate Goatman's Bridge; satanic worship underneath the bridge; four women report being physically attacked by a demonic entity.

programme.title: Have Thinning Hair? Keranique Can Help Regrow Beautiful, Thicker Hair!
programme.desc: If you have thinning hair or hair loss, Keranique can help regrow thicker, longer and fuller hair. Keranique is the number 1 hair regrowth system for women. Regain your confidence with beautiful, thicker and fuller hair in just 3 easy steps!

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Risk-Free Hearing Aid!
programme.desc: Call today to try the high quality, low-price Audien hearing aid, risk-free! No doctor or fittings necessary.

programme.title: Unexplained: Caught on Camera
programme.sub-title: Possessive Attachment & The Girl In The Pub
programme.desc: A possessive attachment makes one couple fear for the future of their unborn son; two explorers make contact with the spirit of a young girl; and an amazing capture of an elderly lady leaves two mediums shaken to their core.

programme.title: Unexplained: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: One man's chance visit to a notorious prison becomes a rescue mission when a demonic spirit takes hold of an amateur ghost hunter and we meet a creepy doll possessed by its former owners, that threatens to burn the house down at any opportunity.

programme.title: Unexplained: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: A demonic spirit terrorizes a Canadian paranormal investigator; two urban explorers capture a spine-chilling figure moving on the stairs; astro photographer Lily Nova claims she's contacted UFOs in the skies above Missouri, all caught on camera.

programme.title: Unexplained: Caught on Camera
programme.sub-title: Theatre of Screams & The Haunted Bridge
programme.desc: Two explorers are shaken to the core after a series of blood-curdling encounters on a haunted bridge; Bailey is terrorized by ghostly intruders at an historic theatre and a paranormal duo investigate a derelict mansion - all caught on camera.

programme.title: Unexplained: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: A haunted museum claims to house the most possessed doll in the U.K.; in Yorkshire, Russell claims to have been abducted by aliens over 60 times.

programme.title: Unexplained: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Dreams of an idyllic life on a rural Pennsylvania farm are shot down by terrifying activity; an urban explorer finds himself scared witless when he visits one of the UK's most haunted houses.

programme.title: Unexplained: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: A Maine resident endures a series of heart-stopping encounters with apparitions in his bedroom; an investigator gets a chilling message from a 17th-century witch-hunter and a series of disturbing encounters are caught on camera at a haunted museum.

programme.title: Unexplained: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Twin brothers claim they were abducted by beings from another planet when they were teens; one urban explorer is brought to his knees in an abandoned asylum; an isolated motion camera captures something not of this world.

programme.title: Unexplained: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: After hearing strange noises, family man Steve captures images of spine-chilling shape shifting Skinwalkers.

programme.title: Unexplained: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: A look at a silent spirit stalker in the Bay State; a look at an English family that hears their floorboards squeak even when no one is there; a look at a Scottish seaside village, where the aurora borealis attracts unwanted visitors.

programme.title: Unexplained: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Factory phantoms terrorize curious explorer Ben in Australia; in Eastbourne, an invisible entity wreaks havoc in Tommy's CBD shop; a possible human experiment gone wrong is on the loose in Casper mountains.

programme.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Two men stumble upon the apparition of a ghostly bride in a haunted church; drone footage captures the elusive Ohio Grassman; frightened ferry passengers witness an alien invasion at sunset.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Mysterious lights hover in the skies above Stonehenge on the eve of the summer solstice; a woman witnesses a soul leaving a dead deer's body; a Florida man finds grisly proof of a violent extraterrestrial attack.

programme.sub-title: Cherry Sisters; President's Missing Cow; Birth of a Nation Riot

programme.title: Mysteries at the Museum
programme.sub-title: Swamp People, Walkie-Talkie Heist and Grant's Writing Water
programme.desc: Don Wildman examines an enigmatic canoe that unlocked the origins of a lost civilization, a miracle drug used by a Civil War hero in his last battle, and a bust involved in a supernatural game of chess.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries at the Museum
programme.sub-title: Evel Spirit, Dawn of the Diaper and Cliff Palace
programme.desc: Don Wildman examines a hot-air balloon used in the first Atlantic crossing by balloon, a ceramic jar used to hold a creepy medical cure and a mission patch tied to a space travel first.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries at the Museum
programme.sub-title: The First Super Computer, Flying Under Fire and Dighton Rock
programme.desc: Don Wildman examines a boulder covered in strange carvings, which could turn American history on its head; a sword belonging to an explorer accused of treason; and the marble bust of a great leader who tried to untangle an ancient puzzle.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries at the Museum
programme.sub-title: King Neptune, Friday Night Bank Robber and Karluk's Last Voyage
programme.desc: Don Wildman examines a patriotic pig that helped fund World War II, a man's trek to rescue his crew during a brutal Arctic expedition, and two activists who risked their lives to take down a superpower and save the whales.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries at the Museum
programme.sub-title: Jap Herron, Hidden Rockwell and Ticket to Fly
programme.desc: Don Wildman examines a novel supposedly written by the ghost of a legendary author, a painting that isn't quite what it seems and a replica of the plane that flew in the first commercial airline flight.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries at the Museum
programme.sub-title: Operation Mincemeat, Texas Prison Rodeo and Tully Monster
programme.desc: Don Wildman examines an enigmatic oar used in an unreal World War II deception, a gold nugget that helped set off the gold rush and a fossil belonging to one of history's strangest creatures.

programme.title: Mysteries at the Museum
programme.sub-title: Reckless, Thousand Island Dressing and the Tornado
programme.desc: Don Wildman examines a hero horse who risked her life, a culinary mystery about a popular salad dressing and an Olympic runner's battle with polio.
